setup: A changeset touching only web/ and backend/ files — no src/, no prisma/schema.prisma, no env file. context/history.md has one entry out of chronological order.
expected_behavior: Reads references/housekeeping.md and reports all four checks, not only the failing one
Reports the history.md ordering problem as an Issue
Reports Prisma migration sync and Env drift as N/A rather than omitting them
States that the console/TODO/@ts-ignore greps and the lint and test steps cover src/ only, so this web/+backend/ changeset was not scanned by them
Points the user at improve for a changeset that no src/-scoped step covers
Makes no edit — check mode is read-only
Does not edit the ## Status table of context/current-feature.md under any circumstances
anti_behavior: Omits the passing housekeeping checks because they passed
Implies the web/ and backend/ files were scanned when only housekeeping looked at them
Reports a clean result without qualifying which stacks the src/-only steps actually covered
Runs npm run lint and reports its src/-scoped result as if it covered the whole changeset
